'''Club Prosperine''' was the name of the famous and exclusive resort located on the [[Kreesis]] continent on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Algara II]]. The resort was very expensive in nature and prided itself on providing the utmost satisfaction to its customers. It was owned by [[Dellin Sorth]], [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|Chief Executive Officer]] of [[Prosperine Entertainment and Distilleries]].

{{Loc-stub}}
